clusters.title: New disk-usage helper has no regression coverage

member_findings.title: New disk-usage helper has no regression coverage
member_findings.impact: The PR adds worker_disk_usage(), which shells out to du and returns parsed stdout, but the diff adds no unit test for the command invocation, stdout handling, or subprocess failure behavior. A future change can break this operator-facing CLI helper without any test failing.
member_findings.fix: Add a focused Python unit test, for example under a CLI test module, that patches subprocess.run and asserts worker_disk_usage() passes the expected data_dir, strips stdout, and defines the expected behavior when du fails or returns stderr.
